content.title: Type 'TransactionMapping' failed to compile
content.message: The node type 'FutuRe/AmericasIns/TransactionMapping' was parked after a compile failure and will not be retried until its source is fixed. Failed to load assembly at /Users/roland/code/MeshWeaver/memex/Memex.Portal.Monolith/bin/Debug/net10.0/.mesh-cache/FutuRe_AmericasIns_TransactionMapping_8ded364af053f56/FutuRe_AmericasIns_TransactionMapping.dll — the build is not usable (corrupt cached .dll or a missing dependency).
